steps.title: Express 15x in terms of 5x
steps.content: Observe that $15x = 3 \cdot 5x$. Since the given equation tells us that $5x = 20$, we can use this relationship directly without solving for $x$ explicitly.

steps.title: Multiply to find 15x
steps.content: Substitute $5x = 20$ into our expression: $$15x = 3(5x) = 3(20) = 60$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
